title: gladiolus carinatus
intro: Gladiolus carinatus, also known as the sticky or prickly corn lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus carinatus include its potential use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus carinatus often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to administer its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
